# Every model translation — before and after each tactic

2394 cases over 42 (task, encoding, scale) groups. Each group's baseline model is dumped once as `before.smt2`; each distinct post-tactic model is one `vNN_<hash>.smt2` (sequences that yield an identical model share a file). All smt2 lives under `smt2/`. Groups are ordered fastest-encoding-first; rows within a group by total ms (apply + solve).
